description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in black from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth leather effect fabric will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 30cmWidth: 38cmDepth:13cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas two large main zipped compartments, one with two internal zipped pockets, one with internal slot pocketsTwo short handles for carrying easeSmall decorative straps with studs on the sidesMetal studs at the baseStylish, easy to grip, metal zip pullsCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
